employee-management-java8.overview:
Employee management using Streams, Lambda, and Comparator.

Features to build:
• Filter Employees
• Sort Employees
• Search Employees
• Department Wise Display

Requirements:
• Use Streams for filtering and sorting
• Use Lambda expressions
• Use Comparator

Bonus:
• Export department summary
employee-management-java8.explanation: Employee Management System (Java 8) is a advanced-level project (Week 6). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Filter Employees, Sort Employees, Search Employees, Department Wise Display.
employee-management-java8.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

student-analytics.overview:
Analytics dashboard using Streams and Optional.

Features to build:
• Highest Marks
• Average Marks
• Failed Students
• Rank List

Requirements:
• Use Streams for analytics
• Use Optional for safe lookups

Bonus:
• Subject-wise analytics

ticket-booking-concurrent.overview:
Concurrent ticket booking with thread safety.

Features to build:
• Multiple Users
• Concurrent Booking
• Thread Safety

Requirements:
• Use multithreading
• Use synchronization for seat booking

Bonus:
• Waiting queue for sold-out seats

task-scheduler.overview:
Background task scheduler using Executor Service.

Features to build:
• Schedule Tasks
• Execute in Background
• Multiple Threads

Requirements:
• Use ExecutorService
• Support scheduled and immediate execution

Bonus:

payroll-processor.overview:
Parallel payroll processing with Streams and Executor Framework.

Features to build:
• Parallel Salary Processing
• Bonus Calculation
• Department Reports

Requirements:
• Use Streams for data processing
• Use Executor Framework for parallel tasks
• Use Collections

Bonus:
• Tax deduction calculation
